text.title: inc-postmortem-auto-draft-no-publish Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for inc-postmortem-auto-draft-no-publish as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLM confidence is uncalibrated for novel incidents; the model is most confident when the situation looks like training data, which is exactly when the surface analogy is misleading.

failure-mode.description: Allowing the agent to cite a "general knowledge" source like "AWS docs" for a specific incident timeline.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The signal set is the universe of truth for one incident; an outside reference smuggles assumptions about what happened from training data, not from the actual outage.
